name: glitchtest-glitch-conditions-sanity
description: Simplified Experiment 1 sanity check for glitch conditions 18, 19, and 20

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r src dist/ && cp -r display dist/ && cp index.html save_data.php complete_study.php synthetic_stock_data_norm.json dist/ && mkdir -p dist/data && echo 'GlitchTest build complete'
